rfis.description: The cyan-highlighted note states “W14×120 steel column (TYP) at ‘SC2’ column location.” Please confirm whether we can follow the same section size for the ALL “SC1” column location as well?
The magenta-clouded column is not shown in the architectural drawings, as indicated in Snap #01. Please advise.
Please provide section for green highlighted beam.

On structural sheet S105B, the yellow-clouded columns are located on Grid 13.1. However, on architectural sheet A0115S, the same columns are offset from Grid “13.1,” as shown in Snap #01. Please advise.

Architectural drawing sheet A0118S indicates that the vestibule area slab edge is 4′-4 1/8″ from Grid B.2(green-clouded in snap #02) However, structural sheet S105B.1 graphically shows the slab edge closer to Grid B.1, as highlighted in magenta. We have followed the slab edge dimension per architectural sheet A0118S.Please confirm.
The total length of the magenta highlighted continuous beams is approximately 92′-0″ length.We intend to splice the beam at shown green clouded dimensions.Please confirm.
The total length of the yellow-clouded continuous beams is approximately 43′-0″ length..Please confirm if the beam splice is required for this length?
The total length of the cyan highlighted continuous beams is approximately 73′-0″ length.We intend to splice the beam at shown CYAN clouded dimensions.Please confirm or L
Please provide section size for blue highlighted beams.
The total length of the green highlighted continuous beams is approximately 78′-0″ length.We intend to splice the beam at shown magenta clouded dimensions.Please confirm.
At the cyan-clouded location, the note indicates “CROSS BRACE WITH”. However, there is no brace detail shown in the structural drawings. Please advise.
